news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade will enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce transaction fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链，扩展跨链功能。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its cross-chain capabilities.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，提议基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，目标降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
